You are a benchmark judge. Score two agents' answers against the ground truth.
Return ONLY a JSON object (no markdown, no explanation outside JSON):

{
  "deob": {
    "purpose": {"score": 0.0, "why": "1 sentence"},
    "functions": {"score": 0.0, "why": "1 sentence"},
    "security": {"score": 0.0, "why": "1 sentence"},
    "dataFlow": {"score": 0.0, "why": "1 sentence"},
    "variables": {"score": 0.0, "why": "1 sentence"}
  },
  "raw": {
    "purpose": {"score": 0.0, "why": "1 sentence"},
    "functions": {"score": 0.0, "why": "1 sentence"},
    "security": {"score": 0.0, "why": "1 sentence"},
    "dataFlow": {"score": 0.0, "why": "1 sentence"},
    "variables": {"score": 0.0, "why": "1 sentence"}
  }
}

Scoring guidelines:
- purpose: Does the one-sentence summary capture the FULL functionality? Penalize missing major features (e.g. "login" only vs "login + profile fetch + update"). Reward accuracy over brevity.
- functions: How many functions were correctly identified (name + purpose + call relationships)? Count both precision and recall. Ignore naming differences if purpose matches.
- security: How many security issues were correctly identified (severity + description)? Full match = 1.0, partial (right issue wrong severity) = 0.5.
- dataFlow: Does the data flow description match the actual flow? Check key steps (input→processing→output). Missing major steps = lower score.
- variables: How many key variables were correctly identified (name/value/purpose)? Match meaning, not exact name.

Ground Truth:
{
  "scenario": "D",
  "difficulty": "hard",
  "description": "Webpack module bundle: utils (date/HTML/function helpers) → api (event fetching + rendering) → app (debounced event loader UI)",
  "obfuscationTechniques": [
    "webpack module wrapping",
    "module ID numbering",
    "__webpack_require__ pattern",
    "variable renaming"
  ],
  "functions": [
    {
      "name": "formatDate",
      "purpose": "Format JS Date to YYYY-MM-DD string",
      "params": [
        "date"
      ],
      "returns": "string",
      "calls": [],
      "calledBy": [
        "fetchEvents"
      ],
      "security": []
    },
    {
      "name": "sanitize",
      "purpose": "HTML-escape special characters (<, >, &, \", ')",
      "params": [
        "input string"
      ],
      "returns": "escaped string",
      "calls": [],
      "calledBy": [
        "renderEvent"
      ],
      "security": [
        "XSS prevention - HTML entity escaping"
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "debounce",
      "purpose": "Create debounced version of fn (delays execution until pause in calls)",
      "params": [
        "fn",
        "delay (ms)"
      ],
      "returns": "debounced function",
      "calls": [],
      "calledBy": [
        "(app module)"
      ],
      "security": []
    },
    {
      "name": "fetchEvents",
      "purpose": "Fetch event list from API for date range",
      "params": [
        "startDate",
        "endDate"
      ],
      "returns": "Promise<events array>",
      "calls": [
        "formatDate"
      ],
      "calledBy": [
        "(app module)"
      ],
      "security": [
        "fetches from external API"
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "renderEvent",
      "purpose": "Render event as HTML div with sanitized title",
      "params": [
        "event object"
      ],
      "returns": "HTML string",
      "calls": [
        "sanitize"
      ],
      "calledBy": [
        "(app module)"
      ],
      "security": [
        "uses innerHTML (potential XSS if sanitize is bypassed)"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "callGraph": {
    "fetchEvents": [
      "formatDate"
    ],
    "renderEvent": [
      "sanitize"
    ],
    "debounced loadEvents": [
      "fetchEvents",
      "renderEvent"
    ]
  },
  "dataFlow": [
    "user click → debounced handler (300ms) → fetchEvents(now, +1day) → API response",
    "events array → forEach → renderEvent → sanitize title → innerHTML insert into DOM"
  ],
  "securityIssues": [
    {
      "severity": "high",
      "issue": "innerHTML usage - XSS vector if sanitize fails",
      "location": "app module"
    },
    {
      "severity": "medium",
      "issue": "API endpoint fetches without authentication",
      "location": "fetchEvents function"
    }
  ],
  "apiEndpoints": [
    {
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/events",
      "purpose": "fetch events for date range",
      "queryParams": [
        "start",
        "end"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "keyVariables": {
    "BASE_URL": "https://api.example.com",
    "debounce delay": "300ms"
  },
  "purposeKeywords": [
    "event|calendar|schedule.*(fetch|load|display)",
    "sanitize|escape|xss",
    "webpack|module|bundle",
    "debounce|throttle|delay",
    "innerhtml|dom|render|inject"
  ]
}

Agent A (deob) Answer:
{
  "purpose": "Webpack module bundle with three modules: utils (date formatting, HTML sanitization, debounce), api (polling endpoint, template rendering), and app (debounced UI event loader that fetches events and renders them into DOM).",
  "functions": [
    {
      "name": "formatDate",
      "purpose": "Format JS Date to YYYY-MM-DD string",
      "calls": [],
      "calledBy": [
        "fetchEvents"
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "sanitize",
      "purpose": "HTML-escape special characters (<, >, &, \", ') to prevent XSS",
      "calls": [],
      "calledBy": [
        "renderEvent"
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "debounce",
      "purpose": "Debounce function with setTimeout — delays execution until pause",
      "calls": [
        "clearTimeout",
        "setTimeout"
      ],
      "calledBy": [
        "app module"
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "fetchEvents",
      "purpose": "Fetch events from API for date range via GET",
      "calls": [
        "formatDate",
        "fetch"
      ],
      "calledBy": [
        "app module"
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "renderEvent",
      "purpose": "Render event as HTML div with sanitized title",
      "calls": [
        "sanitize"
      ],
      "calledBy": [
        "app module"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "endpoints": [
    {
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "/events",
      "purpose": "Fetch events for date range",
      "queryParams": [
        "start",
        "end"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "security": [
    {
      "severity": "high",
      "issue": "innerHTML usage - XSS vector if sanitize fails or is bypassed"
    },
    {
      "severity": "high",
      "issue": "Dynamic code execution via new Function() in string decoder"
    },
    {
      "severity": "medium",
      "issue": "Anti-debugging evasion - detects DevTools via function.toString() regex"
    },
    {
      "severity": "medium",
      "issue": "4-second setInterval polling - potential data exfiltration risk"
    }
  ],
  "dataFlow": "DOM click → debounce(300ms) → fetchEvents(start, end) → GET /events → JSON response → forEach renderEvent → sanitize title → innerHTML → DOM",
  "variables": [
    {
      "name": "BASE_URL",
      "value": "https://api.example.com (decoded at runtime)"
    },
    {
      "name": "debounceDelay",
      "value": "300ms"
    }
  ],
  "entryPoint": "document.getElementById('load-btn').addEventListener('click', ...)",
  "functionCount": 5
}

Agent B (raw) Answer:
{
  "purpose": "Obfuscated content injection script that fetches payload from remote C2 server and renders into DOM via innerHTML.",
  "functions": [
    {
      "name": "stringDecoder",
      "purpose": "RC4-based string decryption and caching dispatcher",
      "calls": [
        "stringTable"
      ],
      "calledBy": [
        "all functions"
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "formatDate",
      "purpose": "URL-safe slug generator from Date objects for API query parameters",
      "calls": [
        "stringDecoder"
      ],
      "calledBy": [
        "apiClient"
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "sanitize",
      "purpose": "HTML entity encoder escaping < > & \" ' characters to prevent XSS",
      "calls": [
        "stringDecoder"
      ],
      "calledBy": [
        "renderer"
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "debounce",
      "purpose": "Debounce utility delaying wrapped function by 300ms",
      "calls": [
        "stringDecoder"
      ],
      "calledBy": [
        "entry"
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "apiClient",
      "purpose": "HTTP API client fetching from remote URL with date-range params",
      "calls": [
        "formatDate",
        "fetch"
      ],
      "calledBy": [
        "debouncedHandler"
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "renderer",
      "purpose": "HTML template renderer building markup from API response",
      "calls": [
        "sanitize"
      ],
      "calledBy": [
        "responseHandler"
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "antiDebug",
      "purpose": "Self-defense anti-debugging engine: clears console, detects code beautification",
      "calls": [
        "stringDecoder"
      ],
      "calledBy": [
        "debounce",
        "setInterval"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "endpoints": [
    {
      "method": "GET",
      "path": "(RC4-encrypted base URL)",
      "purpose": "Fetch content from remote C2 server for DOM injection"
    }
  ],
  "security": [
    {
      "severity": "high",
      "issue": "Multi-layer obfuscation (RC4, control flow flattening, opaque predicates) conceals malicious intent"
    },
    {
      "severity": "high",
      "issue": "Unsanitized DOM injection via innerHTML enabling XSS"
    },
    {
      "severity": "high",
      "issue": "Anti-debugging self-defending: clears console every 4s, detects code beautification"
    },
    {
      "severity": "high",
      "issue": "Dynamic code execution via Function('return this')() bypassing CSP"
    },
    {
      "severity": "medium",
      "issue": "Dead code insertion inflating function bodies"
    }
  ],
  "dataFlow": "DOM click → debounce(300ms) → construct URL with slugs → fetch remote C2 → JSON parse → forEach encode name + render HTML → innerHTML inject into DOM",
  "variables": [
    {
      "name": "BASE_URL",
      "value": "RC4-encrypted, decoded at runtime"
    },
    {
      "name": "debouncedHandler",
      "value": "2000ms debounced click handler"
    }
  ],
  "entryPoint": "IIFE at bottom: addEventListener on DOM element identified by encrypted selector",
  "functionCount": 7
}
